title: Task 7: omnimarket docs refresh and package/node ownership boundary

summary.internal_archive: A paired internal archive preservation PR exists and is open; private repository link intentionally omitted.

ROOT_ENTRYPOINT_REFRESHED.detail: README.md now describes Market ownership, non-ownership boundaries, install, workflows, package model, node model, canary nodes, architecture summary, and docs map.

DOCS_INDEX_ADDED.detail: docs/README.md now provides the public docs index and separates current architecture, reference, migration, and historical-context policy.

PACKAGE_MODEL_PROMOTED.detail: docs/architecture/package-model.md promotes the current ONEX package layers, runtime modes, contract rules, and package isolation status.

BOUNDARY_DOCS_ADDED.detail: docs/architecture/skill-vs-package-vs-node.md explains Market as workflow logic owner and wrapper repos as invocation surfaces.

DEPENDENCY_SCOPE_PROMOTED.detail: docs/architecture/dependency-boundary.md promotes current node metadata dependency-scope guidance from the prior audit material.

MIGRATION_BOUNDARY_PROMOTED.detail: docs/migrations/build-loop.md explains which build-loop logic is Market-owned and which runtime wiring remains external.

NODE_REFERENCE_ADDED.detail: docs/reference/node-catalog.md and docs/reference/node-metadata.md document entry-point discovery, node families, unregistered package directories, and metadata requirements.

CONTRIBUTING_SECURITY_LICENSE_ADDED.detail: Root CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md, and LICENSE were added.

HISTORICAL_DOCS_REMOVED_FROM_PUBLIC_TREE.detail: Public tracking, evidence, and post-mortem markdown was removed after relevant current facts were promoted into stable docs.

PRIVATE_LINKS_REMOVED.detail: Public markdown scan for private workspace references, ticket IDs, Linear links, and old transfer terms returned no matches.

EMPTY_DIRECTORIES_REMOVED.detail: find docs -type d -empty -print returned no empty public docs directories.

LINK_VALIDATION.detail: uv run onex-validate-links --verbose passed: 25 files, 19 links checked.

RUNTIME_SWEEP.detail: uv run python scripts/ci/run_runtime_sweep.py passed: 130/130 entry points OK.

FOCUSED_TESTS.detail: uv run pytest tests/test_all_node_entry_points_are_package_form.py tests/test_metadata_schema.py -q passed: 24 passed, 2 warnings.

PRE_COMMIT.detail: Pre-commit hooks passed during commit after OMNIBASE_INFRA_PATH was set for the repo's topic naming hook.

PR_MERGED.detail: Public PR is open, not merged. Ticket must remain In Review until merge is confirmed.
